tracks.meaning: a substance formed by the chemical combination of two or more elements in fixed proportions
to combine or mix together different elements or parts
a business formed by combining two or more separate companies or entities
complicated or difficult to understand due to multiple elements being combined
a structure consisting of multiple parts joined together, such as a compound fracture where bone breaks in multiple places
an enclosed space containing several buildings or structures within a single boundary
to make a problem or offense worse by adding further offenses or complications
interest calculated on both the principal and accumulated interest from previous periods
a word made up of two or more smaller words or morphemes combined together
a farmer's farmstead consisting of a main house with surrounding outbuildings and land
